official_notes: No recovered historical Claude-vs-official target baseline; used only for old-pipe vs new-pipe Codex comparison.

metadata.label: extra/Dataminr-Infra
metadata.title: Senior Software Engineer, Backend
metadata.team_direction: Dataminr is a mission-driven company that provides organizations with AI-powered intelligence to respond to emerging risks and events

official_notes: No recovered historical Claude-vs-official target baseline; used only for old-pipe vs new-pipe Codex comparison.

findings.issue: Several non-technical qualifiers are bolded, such as team-maintained, existing, and intern-owned. This dilutes the emphasis that should be reserved for technologies and true scope signals.
findings.fix: Remove bold from qualifiers and keep bold only on technologies, metrics, and genuine scope terms.

findings.issue: The header 'Structured Problem Solver' is generic cognition framing rather than a role or domain anchor, so it adds little first-screen hiring signal.
findings.fix: Replace it with a more job-relevant header such as 'Systems judgment:' or 'Backend delivery:' if the supporting bullets can justify it.

findings.issue: The resume self-reports 3+ years, while the JD requires 4+ years building backend services. The visible timeline only supports about 37 months of work experience, so this falls short of the hard gate.
findings.fix: [结构性错配] Treat this as a role-fit gap, not a wording problem. Either target a 3+ year backend role or add only substantiated backend ownership from DiDi/TikTok if you truly have it; wording alone will not clear the requirement.

findings.issue: One intern segment reads like routine use of Go, Python, Java, and Scala as a four-language primary stack, which stretches credibility for the scope shown.
findings.fix: Split the role into the primary languages used per bullet and avoid implying all four were equally core unless the scope is explicitly multi-service and multi-owner.

findings.issue: The latest/relevant section is dominated by percentage lifts and lacks a concrete Tier 1 scope signal, so the impact story is easy to skim past.
findings.fix: Add one credible scope metric in the most relevant bullet, such as services owned, events/day, teams partnered, or a latency/throughput/SLA figure.

revision_priority: [MUST] Resolve the Dataminr 4+ year backend hard gate issue; this profile currently reads as ~3+ years, so it is structurally short of the requirement.
[MUST] Narrow the TikTok internship to the actual primary languages and ownership per bullet so the scope reads credible instead of like a four-language primary stack.
[SHOULD] Add one Tier 1 scope metric to the most relevant backend bullet to replace the current percent-only impact framing.
[NICE] Remove bold from non-technical qualifiers and make the third summary sentence more role-specific.
raw_json.revision_instructions: [结构性错配] 这份简历对 Dataminr 的 4+ 年 backend 硬门槛仍然偏短，无法靠措辞彻底补齐。若继续投这个 JD，只能在 DiDi/TikTok 的最相关 bullets 里补充已发生的 backend 交付证据，并把 TikTok 的四语言叙事收窄为真实主责栈；同时补一个 Tier 1 规模/ownership 指标。第三句 Summary 改成更具体的系统判断型标题，并去掉对非技术限定词的加粗。
